meta.task: Joint test for Lyra v0.2 unified-mechanism candidate

absences.name: NO GUT
absences.falsifier: Coupling convergence at 10^16 GeV with new heavy gauge boson

absences.name: NO proton decay
absences.mechanism_test: N_c-sector inside Internal^6 cross-coupled via -4(z_H · w̄_H)(z_Int · w̄_Int)
absences.obstruction: No isolated N_c-sector trajectory; complete commitment topologically protected
absences.falsifier: ANY positive proton decay observation at any channel

absences.name: NO monopoles
absences.mechanism_test: Inherits from #1 — monopole topology needs unified G that #1 forbids
absences.falsifier: Magnetic monopole detection (MoEDAL, Auger; currently null)

absences.name: NO sterile/SUSY
absences.mechanism_test: D_IV⁵ irreducibility constrains but doesn't directly forbid extensions
absences.obstruction: Δ_full of THIS irrep is 6-term; extensions would have different Δ_full
absences.falsifier: Discovery of sterile neutrino species or SUSY partner at any scale
absences.toy_anchor: Catalog T1949 Möbius sterile-neutrino exclusion (separate anchor)

absences.name: NO DM particle
absences.obstruction: Spectral remainder of incomplete windings = geometric DM
absences.falsifier: ANY direct DM detection at any cross-section/mass (XLZD/DARWIN null)

tier_assessment: Computational verification of Lyra v0.2 candidate; joint test toy
verdict: Ready for Keeper K-audit at scope 4-unified + 1-separate
